TestCase z21Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_array1 = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_array1, t1.array1, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.array1 = follow_case_array1;
    // ------------------------------------
    // Defensive check for empty array
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    // Sort array1 in descending order
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n - 1; ++i) {
        int maxIdx = i;
        for (int j = i + 1; j < follow_case.n; ++j) {
            if (follow_case.array1[j] > follow_case.array1[maxIdx]) {
                maxIdx = j;
            }
        }
        if (maxIdx != i) {
            int temp = follow_case.array1[i];
            follow_case.array1[i] = follow_case.array1[maxIdx];
            follow_case.array1[maxIdx] = temp;
        }
    }
    return follow_case;
}
